mapper.update: update t_order set status=#{s} where id=#{id} and user_id=#{uid}
mapper.select: select * from t_order where user_id=#{uid} order by id
select o.*, i.* from t_order o join t_order_item i on o.order_id = i.order_id where o.user_id=#{uid}
select code, name from t_dict where code=#{code}
